features: Add comprehensive unit tests for utilities, validation, hooks, and components
Replace legacy deploy workflow with tag-based CI/CD pipeline
Add README.md with Quick Start guide, component reference, and usage examples
bugFixes: Fix JSON Bulk Import 404 error by correcting `MASTER.BULK` API path
Fix runtime crash when `attributes.fields` is undefined
Fix `useEffect` infinite loop in SettingsForm, CopyData, and DetailCopy
Add try-catch for `JSON.parse` in all AddJsonData components
Improve bulk import response handling when no items have changes
Fix `BaseUrlProvider` generating incorrect URLs with empty segment
